headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Cullen/Frost Bankers, Sonic Automotive, S&T and Pool
summary: Cullen/Frost Bankers, Sonic Automotive, S&T Bancorp and Pool draw attention as dividend hikes offer steady income amid rising inflation and volatility.
